description: Split the 'Azure Interior - Whole Office Design' opportunity ($120,000) into two phased deals for the client Azure Interior to match their billing cycle. Update the existing opportunity by renaming it to 'Azure Interior - Design Phase' with an expected revenue of $20,000 and a closing date at the end of the current month. Create a new opportunity named 'Azure Interior - Implementation Phase' for the same customer with an expected revenue of $100,000 and a closing date approximately three months from today. Ensure both opportunities are saved and visible in the pipeline.
